message:
🌱 Replace KubeStellar/KubeFlex labels in 3D globe visualization (#1982)

- "KubeStellar" → "Console"
- "Control Plane" → "AI Engine"
- "KubeFlex Core" → "AI Cortex"
- Update loader text

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
